name: Bourbon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Gradually beat the eggs.
2. Add sugar to the beaten eggs.
3. Incorporate melted butter and bourbon into the mixture.
4. Mix in corn starch.
5. Stir in pecans and chocolate chips.
6. Pour the batter into an unbaked pie shell.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes.
8. Serve warm with whipped cream.
